guidances.given_in: reiterated on Q3 FY26 concall (10 Feb 2026); originally given earlier in FY26
guidances.note: Original guidance was 18-20% revenue growth for FY26 ('let me make it very clear that our original guidance was 18% to 20%'). Actual FY26 revenue was INR1,142cr, +38% YoY vs FY25's INR827cr -- well ahead of the guided range.

Management guided order inflow of more than INR2,000cr for FY27, with ~60% from the power sector and the balance from oil & gas (per secondary coverage of the Q4 FY26 call; primary transcript PDF was corrupted/unreadable in this run -- see sourcing note).
Management guided FY27 revenue of ~INR1,500cr and EBITDA margin above 19% (per secondary coverage; primary transcript PDF was corrupted/unreadable in this run -- see sourcing note).

Management expects optimal utilization at the Anjar fabrication facility in FY27, and targets 60-70% utilization at the seamless pipe plant (per secondary coverage; primary transcript PDF was corrupted/unreadable in this run).
